sourceMovie.title: Predator 2
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto Predator 2 (1990) as a science fiction theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The science fiction and action blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Predator
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Predator 2 clicked for you, Predator (1987) is a strong next stop: both trade in science fiction and action, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Predator 2 clicked for you, Predators (2010) is a strong next stop: both trade in science fiction and action, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Predator 2?
faq.answer: Try Predator, Predators, They Live—each shares DNA with Predator 2 while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Predator 2?
faq.answer: Predator 2 (1990) is best described as Science Fiction, Action, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Predator 2 part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "Predator Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
